mapper.select: SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, display_name, icon, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_channels WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY channel_name, start_time
SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, display_name, icon, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_channels WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, display_name, icon, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_channels WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND channel_name = #{channelName} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO epg_channels ( epg_source_id, channel_id, display_name, icon, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{epgSourceId}, #{channelId}, #{displayName, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgChannel$DisplayNameTypeHandler}, #{icon, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgChannel$IconTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0 )

INSERT INTO epg_channels ( epg_source_id, channel_id, display_name, icon, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
(#{program.epgSourceId}, #{program.channelId}, #{program.displayName, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgChannel$DisplayNameTypeHandler}, #{program.icon, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgChannel$IconTypeHandler}, #{program.createdAt}, #{program.updatedAt}, 0)
